job_title: Senior AI/ML Engineer — Ranking, Retrieval & Matching
summary: Own the intelligence layer of Redrob's product — ranking, retrieval, and matching systems. Ship a v2 ranking system with embeddings, hybrid retrieval, and LLM-based re-ranking. Set up evaluation infrastructure (offline benchmarks, A/B testing, feedback loops).

experience_range.note: JD says 5-9 but will consider outside band if signals are strong. Ideal is 6-8 years total, 4-5 in applied ML/AI at product companies.

must_have_skills.description: Production experience with embeddings-based retrieval systems deployed to real users
Production experience with vector databases or hybrid search infrastructure
Strong Python skills, code quality matters
Hands-on experience designing evaluation frameworks for ranking systems

explicit_disqualifiers.description: Entire career in pure research (academic labs, research-only roles) without production deployment
AI experience consists primarily of recent (<12 months) LangChain/API-wrapper projects without pre-LLM ML production experience
Career trajectory shows switching companies every ≤1.5 years to chase titles (Senior → Staff → Principal)
Entire career at consulting/services firms (TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini, etc.) with no product company experience
Primary expertise is computer vision, speech, or robotics WITHOUT significant NLP/IR exposure
Senior engineer who hasn't written production code in 18+ months (moved to pure architecture/tech lead)

ideal_candidate_profile.shipped: At least one end-to-end ranking/search/recommendation system to real users at meaningful scale
ideal_candidate_profile.opinions: Strong opinions about retrieval (hybrid vs dense), evaluation (offline vs online), LLM integration (fine-tune vs prompt)
ideal_candidate_profile.platform_activity: Active on Redrob platform / clearly in the job market
